user.title: Connect to an AE-200 controller
user.description: The controller must be reachable from Home Assistant. The integration uses the local WebSocket endpoint at /b_xmlproc/.

data_description.host: The IP address or hostname used by Home Assistant to reach the AE-200.
data_description.name: A friendly name for this controller.

reconfigure.title: Change AE-200 address
reconfigure.description: Enter the controller's new IP address or hostname. The connection is tested before it is saved.

data_description.host: The new address used by Home Assistant to reach the controller.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to the controller or read its groups

abort.cannot_connect: The imported controller address is invalid

init.title: AE-200 options
init.description: Controls target exactly one selected group. AUTO is sent as Mode="AUTO". Brief controller or network dropouts are retried, and the last good state is retained for the configured number of failed polls.

data.verify_writes: Verify every write by reading the selected group back
data.enable_dry_mode: Expose Dry mode (not observed in supplied dump)
data.enable_fan_only_mode: Expose Fan-only mode (not observed in supplied dump)
data.failed_polls_before_unavailable: Failed polls allowed before entities become unavailable

error.invalid_temperature_range: Minimum temperature must be lower than maximum temperature
